case_title: CLARA SAGE DAMES ET AL VS. PMI SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEAN-PIERRE MAEDER, CEO. FILED BY DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHELLE MAEDER, BOARD OF DIRECTORS, WIFE. FILED BY DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-19-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAMES, CLARA SAGE DAMES, MEGA AS TO DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARA SAGE DAMES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGA DAMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEAN-PIERRE MAEDER (CEO) AND MICHELLE MAEDER (BOARD OF DIRECTORS). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $932.73 (INCLUDES COST) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT WITHIN A WEEK AS AGREED BY DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOVEMBER 7, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAMES, CLARA SAGE DAMES, MEGA AS TO DEFENDANT PMI SAN FRANCISCO
